items.evidence: build.gradle.kts serialSlingerVersion=2.0.15 with blank suffix; package.json and package-lock.json are 2.0.15; npm run jdeploy:release-preflight confirmed Gradle base/display/package 2.0.15 and package serialslinger@2.0.15.
androidApp/build.gradle.kts versionCode bumped from 22 to 23; versionName still follows root serialSlingerDisplayVersion, so Android reports 2.0.15.

Passed npm run jdeploy:release-preflight, ./gradlew check, ./gradlew prepareDesktopJdeployBundle verifyDesktopJdeployBundle, ./gradlew androidApp:compileDebugKotlin, ./gradlew :androidApp:bundleRelease, local jDeploy prepare/package/install-local/verify-install/local launch, npm run jdeploy:pack-preview, gitleaks detect . --no-banner, and git diff --check.
Reviewed release diff: 2.0.15 carries the macOS launcher icon shape fix and generated desktop icon assets; Android has no corresponding behavior or asset change beyond version alignment.
User confirmed hardware testing already passed before this 2.0.15 jDeploy request.
User confirmed hardware testing already passed before this 2.0.15 jDeploy request; local jDeploy install and launch also passed on this Mac.

items.evidence: Prepared release notes: SerialSlinger 2.0.15 fixes the macOS launcher icon shape and keeps Android release versioning aligned with the desktop release.

Release prep committed directly on main as d0301af after confirming main was current with origin/main and Development_Android was behind main; Development_Android will be fast-forwarded to the deployed release state after publication.
Annotated tag v2.0.15 pushed to origin at 42d6fee82d5dc60b68cd79f31214318ddc107bd0.
GitHub Actions run 28328718038 completed successfully in 3m3s; publish-macos-release passed build, jDeploy publish, canonical tarball upload, macOS branding repair, and GitHub release publish.

gh release view v2.0.15 reported published non-draft release at https://github.com/OpenARDF/SerialSlinger/releases/tag/v2.0.15 targeting 42d6fee82d5dc60b68cd79f31214318ddc107bd0 with 2.0.15 desktop installer assets and serialslinger-2.0.15.tgz; tarball asset returned HTTP 200 after redirect.
npm run release:checklist -- --file docs/release-checklist-2.0.15.json --phase final passed after recording final publication evidence.
